desc: Sorted two-pointer with difference target

desc: Char count map

title: Design Linked List

desc: Copy-and-skip trick when you don't have the head. Clever puzzle

desc: Dummy head before iteration so you can delete the original head uniformly

desc: Slow moves 1, fast moves 2

desc: Fixed-gap two-pointer; gap = n

title: Linked List Cycle
desc: Floyd's cycle detection

title: Merge Two Sorted Lists

title: Palindrome Linked List

desc: Walk + accumulate. Warm-up if you need a break

desc: Pair-index invariant (`mid ^ 1`) breaks when single element is to the left

title: Search a 2D Matrix
desc: Treat matrix as flat sorted array; binary search with index math

desc: Binary search the capacity; predicate is `canShipIn(D, capacity)`

desc: Binary search the gap; predicate is `canPlaceMBallsWithGap(g)`

desc: Parity of row + column

desc: Two-stack amortized-O(1) pattern

pattern: Stack-flavored (sometimes filed here, sometimes in Stack)

desc: Stack of indices; DP also works

title: Gas Station
desc: Single pass + reset-on-deficit. Tank tracks running balance

title: Sort Colors

title: Subsets

title: Subsets II

title: Permutations

title: Gray Code

desc: Inorder iterator state via a stack of left-spine
